hero.headline: Stop working
hero.subheadline: Visionari diagnoses what's holding your company back and works with you, week by week, to build the system that lets you scale without losing your mind.

frames.title: Four problems. One system.
frames.subtitle: Visionari detects which one your company is in and works with you on what matters most right now.

vision.title: No clear direction
vision.desc: Your company grows but you don't know if it's heading the right way. Every major decision requires starting from scratch because there's no clear strategic filter.

founders.title: Trapped in daily operations
founders.desc: You work 10 hours and feel like you're not moving forward. Everything depends on you. You can't delegate because no one has enough context to decide without you.

mckinsey.title: Misaligned team
mckinsey.desc: Your team executes tasks but isn't building the company. You implement changes that don't stick. The culture you want isn't the culture you have.

scorecard.title: No metrics that matter
scorecard.desc: You only see financials, and when something fails it's already too late. You don't have the early warning system that tells you what's coming before it arrives.

science.title: Interventions based on real science
science.subtitle: Visionari applies the frameworks with the strongest empirical evidence for company growth. Not generic advice — science validated across thousands of organizations.
science.stat1: of growth failures have an internal cause, not external
science.stat2: companies studied by Bain & Company over 40 years
science.stat3: times more return in companies with high organizational health
science.frameworks: Kantabutra & Avery · Bain Founder's Mentality · McKinsey OHI · Kaplan & Norton BSC
science.quote: 90% of organizations fail to execute their strategy. The cause is rarely a bad strategy. It's the absence of an operating system that turns it into action.
science.quoteSource: Harvard Business Review · Balanced Scorecard Institute

memory.title: The advisor who knows your company
memory.subtitle: Unlike a course or generic chatbot, Visionari accumulates context about your company each session. Week 12 is more powerful than week 1 — because it already knows who you are.

point1.title: Personalized diagnosis
point1.desc: Identifies the real root cause, not the symptom you describe. Most growth problems originate three layers below what's visible.

point2.title: Accumulated memory
point2.desc: Remembers every session, every commitment, every step forward. It doesn't start from zero — it builds on what it already knows about you.

point3.title: Concrete artifacts
point3.desc: Every session ends with something tangible: a system, a metric, a decision. Not insights — tools you use in your company this week.

urgency.title: The cost of having no system
urgency.stat1: out of 10 companies over 3 years old are in Stall-out without knowing it
urgency.stat2: of any strategy's value is lost between planning and execution
urgency.stat3: what one senior strategic consulting session costs
urgency.message: Meanwhile, your most agile competitor is making decisions with more clarity, more speed, and more data than you. Visionari is the system that levels that playing field — without the premium consulting price tag.

pricing.title: One price. Full access.
pricing.subtitle: No tiers, no component limits. All of Visionari for $30/month.
pricing.note: No card during trial · Cancel anytime
pricing.compare: An equivalent consulting session costs $300–$500. Visionari is your advisor available every day.

cta.title: Your company in 12 weeks
cta.subtitle: Not a vague promise — a clear direction, a system that works without you, and metrics that tell you in real time whether you're on track.

dashboard.subtitle: What's going on in your business this week?
